name: python3-cerberus
title: python3-cerberus
summary: Lightweight, extensible data validation library for Python
description:
Lightweight, extensible data validation library for Python
Cerberus provides powerful yet simple and lightweight data
validation functionality out of the box and is designed to be
easily extensible, allowing for custom validation.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cerberus because Lightweight, extensible data validation library for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cerberus as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cerberus with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cerberus --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
